overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime exploration of a neon-lit urban plaza in Night City. The player walks through wet streets reflecting colorful billboards and neon signs, descends stairs to a lower level, and explores a covered walkway with purple-lit water features.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban plaza with digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the wet plaza, observing the neon billboards and palm trees

notable_agents.action: sitting on an illuminated bench facing the plaza

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying colorful abstract advertisement with 'WET DREAM' text
tall palm trees with uplighting at the base, reflecting on wet pavement
vertical digital screen showing beverage advertisement with red and orange tones
modern benches with integrated white LED lighting underneath
tall glass and steel buildings with illuminated windows rising in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide urban plaza at night, wet pavement reflecting the vibrant neon glow of massive digital billboards. Palm trees line the walkway while a few pedestrians sit on illuminated benches. The player walks forward through this cyberpunk cityscape, surrounded by towering skyscrapers and colorful advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza looking up at mega structures

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering mega building with bright spotlights at the top
camera tilts back down to street level, returning to forward walking view

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the towering skyscraper with spotlights, then continuing forward

entered.detail: massive brutalist skyscraper with twin spotlights at the summit, dominating the skyline
horizontal floating digital display with multiple colorful advertisements

segments.scene_description: The player character looks up in awe at a massive mega-skyscraper piercing the night sky, its summit illuminated by powerful spotlights. After admiring the vertical architecture and floating holographic billboards overhead, the camera returns to street level as the walk continues through the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending ramp to lower plaza level

events.description: begins descending stairs from upper plaza to lower covered walkway level

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete stairs into a lower plaza area, transitioning from open to semi-covered space

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of the player down the stairs

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading down to lower level
structural frames illuminated with purple neon lighting marking the entrance to covered area
dark opening leading into a covered pedestrian corridor

segments.scene_description: The player descends a wide concrete staircase from the upper plaza into a lower level, transitioning from the open sky to a semi-covered environment. Purple neon frames mark the entrance to a covered walkway ahead, while the wet pavement continues to reflect the surrounding city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered corridor with water feature walls and purple neon lighting

events.description: enters fully covered corridor with decorative water walls and purple accent lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor, examining the water feature walls and neon-lit architecture

entered.detail: tall rectangular structures with water cascading down textured surfaces, framed by purple neon
building facade illuminated with cyan blue lighting at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in a narrow covered corridor defined by striking decorative walls with cascading water and purple neon framing. The player explores this intimate architectural space, moving past the water features toward a blue-lit building entrance at the corridor's end, completely sheltered from the open sky above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vast, neon-lit urban plaza into the intimate, sheltered confines of a subterranean corridor. It begins by moving through a wide cityscape of wet pavement and towering skyscrapers, where vibrant digital billboards and palm trees line the walkway. As the camera pauses to look up at a massive mega-skyscraper piercing the night sky with powerful spotlights, the perspective then returns to street level to continue the forward progression. The scene shifts as the player descends a wide concrete staircase, transitioning from the open air of the plaza into a semi-covered lower level marked by purple neon frames. Finally, the movement leads into a narrow covered corridor defined by cascading water features and purple lighting, moving away from the city skyline toward a blue-lit building entrance.
